calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clyde Diehl in Propria Persona.

The Court questioned the amount of fees being requested. Mr. Diehl stated that Ms. Fraczek had been paid, that she was not an Attorney and that he assumed that $150.00 an hour was the going rate. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Continued To Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Regarding Distributions To Minor Children
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hilary Lamar for Tina Sherman (Beneficiary).

Ms. Lamar stated that she appeared because of the letter written by one of the Heirs. There being no objections, the Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Continued To Jul-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
